summary: Discover → plan → execute → verify → submit loop for The Synthesis: register participant, create Speed-CLI project, Moltbook post, self-custody transfer, publish, add video and speed-mcp.

phases.description: User requested submission of Speed-CLI to The Synthesis; identified required steps from contest and submission docs.
decisions: Submit Speed-CLI (and speed-mcp) as single project with multiple tracks
Use humanInfo from user; register then create project with track UUIDs from catalog
Moltbook required for submission; register agent then human claims before posting

phases.description: Sequence: register → create project (draft) → Moltbook registration → human claim → create Moltbook post → update project with Moltbook URL → self-custody init → self-custody confirm → publish → add video URL → add speed-mcp to description and metadata.
decisions: Use JSON files for request bodies to avoid shell escaping issues
Fix API validation (background: builder, omit empty URL fields)
Retry transfer confirm after rate limit with backoff

phases.description: Tool calls and API requests executed autonomously.

Checked each response: registration returned apiKey/teamId/participantId; project returned uuid and status draft; Moltbook post returned post id; transfer confirm returned status transfer_complete; publish returned status publish.
Project published and visible to judges; video URL and speed-mcp added to submission.
finalOutputs: speed-mcp referenced in description, tools, and helpfulResources

retriesAndFailures.failure: Invalid URL for videoURL and moltbookPostURL (empty string)
retriesAndFailures.recovery: Removed optional empty URL fields from payload, retried create
